places.name: Varaha Swami — Tirupati
places.modernInfo: Varaha (boar avatar) is the kshetrapalaka (protector) of the entire Tirupati hill. Devotees must first take Varaha's blessing before seeing Venkateswara.

scenes.title: Vishnu lifts Earth from the cosmic ocean
scenes.description: The demon Hiranyaksha had dragged the Earth to the bottom of the cosmic ocean. Vishnu took the form of a cosmic boar — larger than a mountain — dived to the ocean floor, lifted Earth on his tusks, and slew the demon in battle that lasted a thousand years.

scenes.title: Earth rests on Varaha's tusk
scenes.description: The Varaha Purana says the Earth (Bhudevi) is still resting on the tusk of Varaha. When Varaha moves, earthquakes occur. Bhudevi became his consort — she is the other wife of Vishnu alongside Lakshmi.
